examples: She received a cosmetic makeover at a beauty salon as a birthday gift.
The glitterati of Hollywood are flocking to Janet Vaughan's nail salon.
I used to go to an English salon on Sundays.
Salon book critic Laura Miller picks novel Bangkok Tattoo as her top summer read.
Upstairs is a spacious salon and library serving superb cocktails and light all-day fare, such as dim sum.
